arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the ECS cluster.

id.description: The unique identifier of the ECS cluster.

pending_tasks_count.description: The number of tasks in the cluster that are in the pending state.

registered_container_instances_count.description: The number of container instances registered with the cluster.

running_tasks_count.description: The number of tasks in the cluster that are in the running state.

service_connect_defaults.description: The default service connect configurations for the cluster.

setting.description: The settings applied to the ECS cluster, such as container insights.

status.description: The current status of the ECS cluster.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the ECS cluster.
